on_tool_error.command: prismer evolve report --error "$ERROR" --task "$TASK" --status failed --provider claude-code --stage "$TOOL" --severity high 2>/dev/null || true

on_task_complete.command: prismer evolve report --task "$TASK" --status success --provider claude-code --stage task --score 0.9 2>/dev/null || true

on_subagent_error.command: prismer evolve report --error "$ERROR" --task "$TASK" --status failed --provider claude-code --stage subagent --severity medium 2>/dev/null || true
